segment_description: Households that buy campaign-targeted items and respond to retailer coupons or broad store discounts.
recommended_action: Prioritize targeted coupon bundles and measure lift against a holdout group.

segment_description: Households with strong private label affinity and owned-brand basket share.
recommended_action: Grow owned-brand baskets with replenishment reminders and category extensions.

segment_description: Households that respond to manufacturer coupons and discounts on national brands.
recommended_action: Coordinate brand-funded offers and stock-up messaging around national brand promotions.

segment_description: High-engagement households with limited discount dependence.
recommended_action: Protect margin with service-oriented messages and selective loyalty recognition.
